parameters.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$backupDir = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE 'Desktop\rudy-backups'; $wfDir = Join-Path $backupDir 'workflows'; $dbDir = Join-Path $backupDir 'database'; foreach ($d in @($wfDir, $dbDir)) { if (-not (Test-Path $d)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $d | Out-Null } }; $datestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'; Write-Output \"Starting backup for $datestamp\"; n8n export:workflow --all --output=\"$wfDir\" 2>&1; Write-Output \"Workflows exported\"; $n8nDb = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.n8n\database.sqlite'; if (Test-Path $n8nDb) { Copy-Item $n8nDb \"$dbDir\database-$datestamp.sqlite\" -Force; Write-Output \"Database backed up\" } else { Write-Output \"Database file not found at $n8nDb\" }; $oldBackups = Get-ChildItem $dbDir -Filter 'database-*.sqlite' | Sort-Object Name -Descending | Select-Object -Skip 7; foreach ($old in $oldBackups) { Remove-Item $old.FullName -Force; Write-Output \"Rotated: $($old.Name)\" }; Write-Output \"Backup complete\""

parameters.subject: =[Rudy] Backup FAILED
